card.headline: OS_cleaningAR not delivering training
reasons: OS_cleaningAR stays at zero performance and difficulty despite adherence—patient gets no training benefit; swap/troubleshoot protocol.

items.text: OS_cleaningAR stays at zero performance and difficulty despite adherence—patient gets no training benefit; swap/troubleshoot protocol.

checkin.wins: Early this week you really leaned into Twister and Blobs—your control looked steadier even when the games pushed you harder.
checkin.to_improve: After the quiet stretch, try a short reset day—Hockey AR and a few Cleaning AR rounds to restart the rhythm.
